title: Metrics Foundation Health Dashboard
description: Prometheus, Node Exporter, cAdvisor scrape health, storage, dashboard-data freshness, and prepared OTel Docker Stats replacement state. cAdvisor target health is separated from Docker-container discovery quality.

panels.title: Prometheus Target States
panels.description: Current target states for Prometheus, Node Exporter, cAdvisor, and any prepared OTel job after live deployment.

panels.title: cAdvisor Target Health
panels.description: cAdvisor target scrape state. This does not prove Docker-container discovery on Docker 29/containerd.

options.content: cAdvisor is scrapeable, but Docker-container discovery is **limited/degraded** under Docker 29.6.1 with the containerd-backed image store. Treat cAdvisor target health separately from container-level observability completeness.

panels.title: Scrape Samples
panels.description: Samples scraped by Prometheus per target.

panels.title: Prometheus Head Series
panels.description: Current active time series in the Prometheus TSDB head block.

panels.title: Dashboard Data Freshness
panels.description: Seconds since Prometheus last scraped each target.

panels.title: OTel Docker Stats Target
panels.description: Prepared replacement scrape target. No data is expected before proxy, Collector, and Prometheus reload are live-proven.

panels.title: Container Metrics Source State
panels.description: Separates cAdvisor scrape availability from OTel Docker-container collection readiness.

options.content: cAdvisor remains active/degraded: target availability does not prove Docker-container discovery. OTel Docker Stats is repository-prepared through a restricted Docker API proxy and remains pending live proof. Prometheus remains the only Grafana data source; Grafana must not query cAdvisor, Node Exporter, the proxy, or OTel directly.
